titleStmt.title: SII 39.53: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 53. (A.R. No. 53 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, LEFT OF ENTRANCE. •••••••••• ŚAKA 1377 (1455-56 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription also informs a similar agreement regarding the celebration of festivals of the deity of Chandrasēkhara which was setup in the same temple by Tiruveppruaradaiyāṉ, Inbavaṇapperumāḷ, Tirumuṇḍalagiyār etc. the residents of Iḷaiyāttakkuḍi alias Kulaśēkharapuram in Kalvāsalnāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cakāttam 1000 3 100 7 10 7- l cellā niṉṟa Īśvara varuṣam Aṟpaci mātam 6 §
nayiṉār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nayiṉār tirukkoyil śrī paṇṭāra
ttārom kalvācal nāṭṭu Iḷaiyāttakkuṭiyāṉa kulacekarapurattu tiruveṭpūruṭaiyāṉ
Iṉpavaṉap perumāḷ tirumuṇṭamaḻakiyār Inta tirukkoyilukku
cantiracekararai Eḻuntaruḷap paṇṇukaiyil Ivaṟku tirunāḷukku
Aṟṟaik kuṟai Aṟuppāka tirumayap pūccum tirupparivaṭṭamum ku
ṟaivaṟa naṭatti cannatiyile Oṭukkum tirumālaiyum peṟṟu kṣaya varuṣam Āva
ṇi mātam 10 9- l tirumuṇṭamaḻakiyarāṉa Iḷaikaik koṉār Aḻakiya cokkaṉā
meṟpaṭi meyyar Aḻaka paripālan Ikkoyilukku munnāḷ Eṅkaḷ takappanā Ik
koyilukku cantiracekararai Ēṟiyaruḷappaṇṇi
tirukkoḷakkuṭi Āṇṭa nayiṉār paḻam tevatāṉam Āṉa Irā
ciṅka maṅkalattil puravil nāyanār kuḷamum vayalum kiṇaṟum menokkiya maramum vay
Digital edition of SII 39.53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
